name.zh: 日本男足青训与校园足球体系
name.native: 日本男子ユース育成・学校サッカー体系

summary.zh: JFA 第2种注册把高校足球部与俱乐部青年队纳入同一年龄层。两类组织都可进入高圆宫杯联赛金字塔，但高校专属杯赛和俱乐部专属赛事保持独立。
summary.en: JFA second-category registration places high-school teams and club youth teams in the same age band. Both can enter the Prince/Premier league pyramid, while school-only cups and the club-youth championship remain distinct.

name.zh: 都道府县 U18 联赛

stable_structure.zh: 地区基层联赛；表现优异球队可进入地区 Prince League 参入战或相应升降级路径。
stable_structure.en: The prefectural base of the pyramid, feeding promotion routes toward the regional Prince Leagues.

name.zh: 高圆宫杯 JFA U18 Prince League
name.native: 高円宮杯 JFA U-18 サッカープリンスリーグ

stable_structure.zh: 北海道、东北、关东、北信越、东海、关西、中国、四国、九州九个地区联赛，上接 Premier League。
stable_structure.en: Nine regional leagues—Hokkaido, Tohoku, Kanto, Hokushinetsu, Tokai, Kansai, Chugoku, Shikoku and Kyushu—below the Premier League.

name.zh: 高圆宫杯 JFA U18 Premier League
name.native: 高円宮杯 JFA U-18 サッカープレミアリーグ

stable_structure.zh: 全国最高层 U18 联赛，分 EAST 与 WEST；两区冠军参加 Final，末位球队降级并通过附加赛补充升级球队。
stable_structure.en: The national top tier, split into EAST and WEST. Section winners meet in the Final, with relegation and promotion playoffs linking it to the Prince Leagues.

note.zh: 2026 赛季每区 12 队；年度队数属于快照，不作为永久规则。
note.en: The 2026 snapshot has 12 teams per section; the team count is season-specific rather than a permanent rule.

name.zh: 高圆宫杯 Premier League Final
name.native: プレミアリーグ ファイナル

stable_structure.zh: Premier League EAST 与 WEST 冠军之间的年度总决赛。
stable_structure.en: The annual championship match between the EAST and WEST winners.

name.zh: 全国高校综合体育大会足球赛
name.en: National High School Sports Festival football tournament
name.native: 全国高等学校総合体育大会サッカー競技大会

stable_structure.zh: 高校球队专属的夏季全国淘汰赛，不能与俱乐部 U18 赛事混同。
stable_structure.en: A summer national knockout competition reserved for high-school teams.

name.zh: 全国高校足球选手权大会
name.en: All Japan High School Soccer Tournament
name.native: 全国高等学校サッカー選手権大会

stable_structure.zh: 经都道府县预选产生代表队的冬季全国高校赛事。
stable_structure.en: The winter national high-school championship, reached through prefectural qualification.

name.zh: 日本俱乐部青年 U18 锦标赛
name.native: 日本クラブユースサッカー選手権（U-18）大会

stable_structure.zh: 俱乐部青年队专属全国赛事。俱乐部 U18 也能参加高圆宫联赛，但本赛事不对高校足球部开放。
stable_structure.en: A national competition for club youth teams. Club academies also play in the Takamado leagues, but this event is not a school competition.

name.zh: 地区大学联赛

stable_structure.zh: 大学球队的全年地区联赛体系，并与全国大学赛事构成大学阶段的主要比赛环境。
stable_structure.en: Season-long regional university leagues that form the main university competition environment alongside national cups.

name.zh: 总理大臣杯全日本大学足球赛
name.en: Prime Minister's Cup All Japan University Tournament
name.native: 総理大臣杯全日本大学サッカートーナメント

stable_structure.zh: 大学球队参加的全国杯赛。
stable_structure.en: A national cup competition for university teams.

name.zh: 全日本大学足球锦标赛
name.native: 全日本大学サッカー選手権大会

stable_structure.zh: 大学赛季的全国性锦标赛。
stable_structure.en: A national championship at the university stage.

name.zh: JFA/J.League 特别指定球员制度
name.native: JFA・Jリーグ特別指定選手制度

stable_structure.zh: 符合条件的大学或高中注册球员可在保留原注册的同时参加指定 J.League 俱乐部活动，形成校园足球到职业队的桥梁。
stable_structure.en: Eligible university or high-school players can retain their school registration while participating with a designated J.League club, creating a bridge into the professional game.

name.zh: 韩国男足青训、学校与大学体系
name.en: Korea Republic men's youth, school and university system

summary.zh: 韩国高中年龄层同时存在普通高中足球部和 K League 俱乐部 U18。部分俱乐部 U18 以合作高中名义参赛，因此母俱乐部与教育合作学校必须分别记录。
summary.en: Korea's high-school age band includes independent school teams and K League U18 academies. Some club academies compete under partner-school identities, so the parent club and education partner must be stored separately.

name.zh: KFA 全国高中联赛

stable_structure.zh: KFA 管理的高中年龄层联赛环境，既包含普通学校队，也可能出现以合作高中身份注册的职业俱乐部 U18。
stable_structure.en: The KFA high-school league environment includes independent schools and professional-club U18 teams registered through partner-school identities.

name.zh: 高中联赛王中王赛

stable_structure.zh: 全国高中联赛体系的阶段性冠军赛；参赛身份应按当年竞赛规程核查。
stable_structure.en: The championship stage of the national high-school league system; entries must be checked against the rules for each season.

name.zh: K League Junior U18

stable_structure.zh: K League 职业俱乐部 U18 梯队的全年联赛。球队常同时显示俱乐部梯队名和合作高中名。
stable_structure.en: The season-long league for K League club U18 academies, whose listings often pair the club academy with an education-partner high school.

name.zh: K League Junior U17

stable_structure.zh: 职业俱乐部梯队的低年龄补充联赛，不等同于独立 U17 学校体系。
stable_structure.en: A younger-age competition attached to professional club academies, not a separate school system.

name.zh: K League 青少年锦标赛

stable_structure.zh: K League 俱乐部青训队参加的集中赛会制赛事，与 Junior 全年联赛分开记录。
stable_structure.en: A tournament event for K League academies, recorded separately from the season-long Junior league.

name.zh: KFA U-League

stable_structure.zh: 韩国大学球队的主要联赛通道，是学校年龄层向职业足球过渡的重要阶段。
stable_structure.en: The main league pathway for Korean university teams and an important bridge from school-age football toward the professional game.

name.zh: Gimcheon Sangmu 成年军队球队

stable_structure.zh: Gimcheon Sangmu 是成年职业军队球队，应作为服役阶段的职业路径节点，不归入 U18 青训梯队。
stable_structure.en: Gimcheon Sangmu is a senior professional military-service club and must be treated as an adult career node, not as a youth academy.

name.zh: 挪威男足基层、精英识别与俱乐部学院体系
name.en: Norway men's grassroots, talent identification and academy system

summary.zh: 挪威把日常培养留在本地俱乐部，以 NFF 的 Kvalitetsklubb 提升基层组织质量，再通过 18 个地区足协运营的 Landslagsskolen 识别 12 至 16 岁球员；职业俱乐部端则由 Norsk Toppfotball 的 Akademiklassifiseringen 设定学院标准并关注自培球员进入成年队的产出。
summary.en: Norway keeps day-to-day development in local clubs, uses the NFF Kvalitetsklubb programme to strengthen grassroots organizations, and identifies players aged 12 to 16 through the district-operated Landslagsskolen. At elite-club level, Norsk Toppfotball's Akademiklassifiseringen sets academy standards and measures progression into senior football.

label.zh: NFF 基层与青少年俱乐部

name.zh: NFF Landslagsskolen 国家队学校

stable_structure.zh: 俱乐部提名球员进入地区足协的分区与地区队活动，随后衔接顶级组、全国人才营和年龄段国家队。它是俱乐部日常训练之外的补充识别与反馈体系，不取代球员原俱乐部。
stable_structure.en: Clubs nominate players into district zone and regional-team activity, which feeds top groups, national talent camps and youth national teams. It supplements rather than replaces daily club training.

note.zh: NFF 地区说明把路径拆为分区、地区队、顶级组、人才营和年龄段国家队；12 岁进入首层，覆盖至 16 岁。
note.en: NFF district guidance describes a pathway from zones through regional teams and top groups to talent camps and youth national teams, beginning at age 12 and running through age 16.

name.zh: NFF Kvalitetsklubb 质量俱乐部

stable_structure.zh: 面向所有开展儿童和青少年足球的俱乐部，以规划、关键岗位、教练能力和安全环境为最低标准，由地区足协顾问持续辅导并完成认证。
stable_structure.en: A certification and development process for any club running children's or youth football, built around planning, key roles, coaching competence and a safe environment, with continuing support from district advisers.

name.zh: NTF Akademiklassifiseringen 学院评级

stable_structure.zh: Norsk Toppfotball 以五级标准评估顶级俱乐部的发展结构，既看规划、人员、训练、学校合作和设施，也以 25 岁以下自培球员在成年高水平比赛的时间衡量产出。
stable_structure.en: Norsk Toppfotball uses five classification levels to assess elite-club development structures across planning, staff, training, school cooperation and facilities, while also measuring senior minutes earned by club-developed players under 25.

note.zh: 2025 轮次有 30 家俱乐部完成评级；AK-25 是第二个评级周期的起点，模型继续提高对实际球员产出的权重。
note.en: Thirty clubs completed the 2025 classification. AK-25 begins the second classification cycle and increases the weight given to player productivity.

source_links.label: NFF 2026 Landslagsskolen levels and nomination flow
Norsk Toppfotball AK-25 plan completion snapshot

name.zh: 丹麦男足人才中心与俱乐部青训许可体系
name.en: Denmark men's talent-centre and youth club licensing system

summary.zh: 丹麦以俱乐部作为球员日常培养主体，DBU 一端用星级青训许可约束学院治理、教练和球员支持，另一端通过 U13/U14 训练与 U15 人才中心持续观察、训练并把反馈送回球员俱乐部。
summary.en: Denmark keeps daily development with clubs. DBU's star-based youth licence governs academy management, coaching and player support, while U13/U14 training and U15 talent centres provide recurring observation, training and feedback routed back through each player's club.

label.zh: DBU 男足青少年许可俱乐部

name.zh: DBU 男足青少年俱乐部许可

stable_structure.zh: DBU 通过星级许可把竞技与生活双重发展、学院管理、教练配置和个体发展职责纳入统一审核，并把 U17/U19 联赛参赛环境与许可要求相连。
stable_structure.en: DBU's star-based licence reviews sporting and civic development, academy management, staffing and individual-development responsibilities, and links the U17/U19 competition environment to licensing requirements.

note.zh: 当前手册周期为 2026 至 2028，并新增个人发展负责人及教练学习与领导力模块要求。
note.en: The current manual covers 2026 to 2028 and adds an individual-development lead alongside coach learning-and-leadership requirements.

name.zh: DBU Talent U13/U14 训练

stable_structure.zh: DBU 人才教练和球探在俱乐部比赛与集中训练中持续观察球员；每次活动包含训练与内部比赛，评估反馈通过球员的俱乐部教练传递。
stable_structure.en: DBU talent coaches and scouts observe players in club matches and central sessions. Each activity combines training with an internal match, and feedback is delivered through the player's club coach.

note.zh: U13/U14 年度安排为秋季 3 次、春季 4 次单日训练。
note.en: The U13/U14 year is structured around three one-day autumn sessions and four one-day spring sessions.

name.zh: DBU U15 人才中心

stable_structure.zh: U15 阶段升级为两日人才中心活动，包含两次训练和一场比赛；书面评估先发送至俱乐部，再由俱乐部与球员沟通。
stable_structure.en: At U15 the pathway moves to two-day talent-centre gatherings with two training sessions and one match. Written feedback goes first to the club, which reviews it with the player.

source_links.label: DBU boys' youth club licensing hub

name.zh: 瑞典男足球员培养计划与精英学院认证体系
name.en: Sweden men's player-development plan and elite academy certification system

summary.zh: 瑞典足协以 6 至 19 岁球员培养计划和统一比赛形式为全国俱乐部提供训练框架；精英端由 Svensk Elitfotboll 的 Unicoach 网络按年度认证学院，并把教练培养、组织质量和青年球员进入成年队一起纳入评价。
summary.en: The Swedish FA provides clubs with a national development plan for ages 6 to 19 and common game formats. At elite level, Svensk Elitfotboll's Unicoach network certifies academies annually and evaluates coaching, organizational quality and transition into senior football.

name.zh: SvFF 球员培养计划

stable_structure.zh: 以“踢、玩、学”原则为基础，为 6 至 19 岁不同阶段提供训练和比赛环境建议，目标同时覆盖长期发展、乐趣与终身足球参与。
stable_structure.en: Based on the Play, Play and Learn principles, the plan guides training and match environments from ages 6 to 19 with long-term development, enjoyment and lifelong participation as joint aims.

name.zh: 瑞典全国青少年比赛形式

stable_structure.zh: 全国统一使用 3v3、5v5、7v7、9v9 到 11v11 的年龄递进比赛形式，让场地、人数和规则随儿童与青少年发展阶段变化。
stable_structure.en: National 3v3, 5v5, 7v7, 9v9 and 11v11 formats scale pitch, team size and rules with children's and youth development stages.

name.zh: SEF Unicoach 学院认证

stable_structure.zh: SEF 每年走访并量化评估参与俱乐部的 10 至 19 岁学院，覆盖俱乐部治理、人员、球员、训练、比赛、设施与自培球员产出，以一至七星表达认证结果。
stable_structure.en: SEF visits and scores participating clubs' academies for ages 10 to 19 each year, covering governance, staff, players, training, matches, facilities and academy-player output, with certification expressed from one to seven stars.

note.zh: SEF 2025 年报记录 31 家 Unicoach 俱乐部获认证，另有 12 家 Ettan 俱乐部参与。
note.en: SEF's 2025 annual report records 31 certified Unicoach clubs plus 12 participating Ettan clubs.
